PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?durationMinutes WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P1346 wd:Q504309 ; wdt:P585 ?endDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?endDate) >= 1985)
  ?game wdt:P361 ?series ; wdt:P1923 wd:Q504309 ; wdt:P2412 ?durationStr .

  FILTER(?durationMinutes > 0)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?durationMinutes)
OFFSET 3
LIMIT 1

SELECT ?game ?durationMinutes
WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P1346 wd:Q504309 ;

  ?game wdt:P361 ?series ;

  FILTER (?durationMinutes > 0)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?durationMinutes)
OFFSET 3
LIMIT 1
